title: phellandrium aquaticum var. microcarpum
intro: Phellandrium aquaticum var. microcarpum, also known as a variety of water dropwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Phellandrium aquaticum var. microcarpum include relief from bloating, improved kidney function, and a decrease in blood pressure. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water to unlock its medicinal properties.
